Product.title: Product
Product.description: Products for sale, including sneakers, clothes, and imported perfumes

description.description: Premium description and specifications of the item

price.description: Regular selling price of the item

promoPrice.description: Promotional or clearance price if available, otherwise identical to price

category.description: Category ID of the item (e.g., Roupas, Tênis, Perfumes)

images.description: List of high-resolution product image URLs

sizes.description: Array of available size options (EU numbers, letters, oz format)

brand.description: The designer or brand of the streetwear, apparel, or perfume

featured.description: True if displayed on the premier showcase

isNew.description: True if item is a part of the newly received collection

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this item was listed

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Product categories in the luxury boutique

active.description: True if this category is visible and products can be browsed

userId.description: ID of the customer who made the purchase

items.description: Array of purchased items with product IDs, chosen size, color, and quantity

total.description: Grand total after discount is applied

status.description: Order processing status: Pendente, Pago, Enviado, Cancelado

paymentMethod.description: Payment instrument chosen: PIX, Cartão de Crédito, Cartão de Débito

paymentDetails.description: Simulated or actual gateway transaction details

code.description: Text code of the voucher (e.g., DUBAI10)

discountPercent.description: Voucher percent discount rate from 1 to 99

active.description: True if the voucher can still be verified at checkout

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Registered customer profiles, addresses, history and favorites tracking

blocked.description: True if account is suspended from ordering

favorites.description: List of liked product IDs for user vitrine tracking

SiteConfig.title: SiteConfig
SiteConfig.description: Universal settings, Checkout details, and social links

pixKey.description: Recipient PIX key configured by admin

gateway.description: Active chosen gateway API: Stripe, Mercado Pago, PagSeguro

creditCardEnabled.description: Master switch to support credit card

debitCardEnabled.description: Master switch to support debit card

Review.title: Review
Review.description: Customer comments and stars rating for individual products

productId.description: Core product associated with this review

userId.description: Customer account ID of writing reviewer

/products/{productId}.description: Products for sale in the shop

/orders/{orderId}.description: Customer checkout bills and status records

/userProfiles/{uid}.description: Confidential customer details and favorite products history

/siteConfig/{configId}.description: Store contact numbers, PIX configuration, and payment gateway rules

/reviews/{reviewId}.description: Boutique product feedback written by shoppers
